images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful young Japanese gravure idol perched gracefully on a sleek kitchen counter, exuding a fresh, youthful vibe with wet hair after a shower. She wears a form-fitting, trendy Bunny Girl costume featuring glossy satin textures and delicate lace trims that accentuate her fit, curvy silhouette and cleavage. She looks down with a shy smile, holding a delicate champagne glass, her large expressive eyes and flushed skin texture visible with pores and faint vellus hair. The environment is a high-end, minimalist modern apartment blurred into creamy bokeh, illuminated by bright, clear Cyberpunk dual tone lighting—neon pink and cyan—that casts a professional glow without harsh shadows. Mood is clean and crisp with a Bleach bypass color grade, high contrast, and low saturation. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination.8k photo, Large breasts, deep cleavage, ample cleavage, sexy photo, beautilful girl without makeup
